description.value:
Frequency once per day

You call upon the spinning and beating hearts of every planet you've ever visited and share their true power with your enemies, unleashing a blast of superdense, red-hot iron shards. Each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] takes @Damage[14d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage and @Damage[4d6[persistent,fire]|options:area-damage] damage with a basic Reflex save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. A creature that fails its save becomes suppressed until the end of your next turn. If you and your targets are in an underground environment, they don't get a bonus to their Reflex saves from standard cover against World Shards but still gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Reflex saves if they have greater cover.
